message:
test(proptest): add 29 property tests for quota gate and cost tracker coverage gaps

quota_gate: 7→23 tests (is_blocked/is_warned mirrors, default signals, exhausted/fully-limited/critical always block, warning-only never blocks, clear rate limit, partially limited warns, verdict/source serde, verdict ordering, low quota percentage, telemetry accumulation, agent_type preservation, escalation)

cost_tracker: 9→22 tests (warning_fraction clamping, LRU eviction keeps recent, sorted summaries, agent_type update on reuse, record_count tracking, last_updated_ms max, zero budget no alerts, grand total equals provider sum, set_config changes alerts, usages_recorded count, AlertSeverity serde, remove/re-add starts fresh)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
